name: the conformance auditor flags a coding rule that is missing provenance
command:
mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/google
printf %s 'source:
  id: x
rules:
  - id: nop
    name: n
    severity: P1
' > generated-code-quality-standards/google/bad.yaml
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-citation-conformance.sh --root .
